message:
fix(storage): simplify cycle detection, stabilize blocked cache, cascade purge timestamps

Three related fixes in the SQLite storage layer:

1. Cycle detection: unify dependency direction so parent-child edges
   are traversed in the same direction as other dependency types,
   removing the bidirectional UNION queries that could miss cycles.
   Also removes the unused `execute_batch` import.

2. Blocked-cache rebuild: replace DROP TABLE + CREATE TABLE with
   incremental DELETE of stale entries followed by INSERT OR REPLACE.
   DROP TABLE caused "database schema has changed" errors for
   concurrent readers in multi-agent environments. Remove the now-
   unused `reset_blocked_cache_table` helper.

3. Purge cascading: when an issue is purged, touch `updated_at` on
   all issues that depended on it and mark them dirty, so downstream
   sync picks up the dependency removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
